title: Intensity Modulated Radiation Therapy Plus Etoposide/Cisplatin for Patients With Limited Advanced Unresectable Thymic Epithelial Tumors: A Prospective Phase 2 Study.
abstract: This prospective phase 2 study evaluated the efficacy and safety of intensity modulated radiation therapy plus etoposide/cisplatin (EP) for patients with unresectable thymic epithelial tumors (TETs).
journal: Int J Radiat Oncol Biol Phys
trial_name: Intensity modulated radiation therapy plus etoposide/cisplatin for limited advanced unresectable thymic epithelial tumors
